claim.targetPopulation: preliminary reviewed TypeScript/JavaScript public-OSS workspace corpus; agent-reviewed manifests and agent labels only
claim.supportedSyntaxProfile: ts-js-supported-v1 plus known limitations around package subpath exports and route-style $ filenames

samplingPlan.method: deterministic per-rule sampling with perRuleCap=2 and minPerRepository=1 for pilot diagnosis

labelingPlan.limitation: Raters are Codex-generated preliminary labels, not independent human blind labels.

exclusionRules: out_of_scope labels are excluded from blocking precision denominator by the claim script label taxonomy
invalid_setup labels identify manifest/review setup failures and are not counted as upstream defects
